pages.text: Cockroaches can be given 'The Roach Crown', becoming the Roach King,nearby cockroaches also get turned into servants
pages.title: Asmongold

pages.text: Cockroach servants convert other roaches and attack those that harm the king
[MUST HAVE ALEXS CAVES PRESENT] Cockroach mutate to Gammaroach when exposed to radiation
pages.title: Cockroach Mutation
